title: Bethany's Pumpkin Crunch Cake
description: A holiday-favorite dump cake: spiced pumpkin custard topped with a buttery spice-cake-and-pecan crunch, chilled and served with whipped cream.

items: 1 spice cake mix (15.25 ounce package, see notes)

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Lightly grease and flour the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking pan.
In a large bowl, combine pumpkin puree, evaporated milk, eggs, white sugar, brown sugar, spices, and salt. Mix until well combined and smooth. Pour into the prepared baking pan.
Combine cake mix and melted butter with a fork or pastry cutter. Mix in chopped pecans. Sprinkle over pumpkin mixture.
Bake for 50–55 minutes, or until a wooden skewer inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool completely in the pan on a wire rack then refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.

notes.label: Cake mix
notes.text: Use a 15.25 ounce package of spice cake mix; do not prepare it — it goes on dry, cut into the melted butter.
